stemHtml: A crew is preparing for a flight in low visibility conditions. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: LVO procedures do NOT have to be active.
options.b: The SOP's for LVO might differ from flights where no low visibility operations exist.
options.c: It is still possible to operate the aircraft in case of a technical failure because LVO procedures rely less on aircraft systems compared to in VMC.
options.d: The aircraft is only certified for low visibility when low visibility procedures are active at the destination aerodrome.
